Describe what is happening on the stage involving the main performers.
canonical_answer: A man wearing a black hat and black long-sleeved shirt plays an acoustic guitar on the right side of the stage. A woman with long dark hair and a black cowboy hat sings into a microphone on the left. Behind them, a large banner with a sunburst graphic hangs on a metal truss structure. Equipment cases labeled Yamaha M7CL are visible on the stage floor near the performers.

question: What entities are present and what are they doing regarding the background equipment and setting?
canonical_answer: Metal truss structures supporting stage lights stand behind the performers. A large banner displaying the text STEREO and a sunburst graphic serves as the backdrop. Black equipment cases with white text reading YAMAHA M7CL sit on the left side. A third person in a dark shirt operates equipment near the cases in the background.

question: Describe the sequence of actions performed by the woman wearing a black hat throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the woman wearing a black hat holds a microphone; at 8s, she sings into the handheld microphone while standing next to the guitarist; at 10s, she starts playing the black keyboard on a stand; at 16s, she holds a tambourine while singing; at 18s, she switches to playing a stringed instrument.

question: Describe the changing text visible on the stage equipment and banners throughout the performance.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the word STEREO is partially visible on the backdrop banner; at 8s, the text nord stage appears on a red keyboard; at 10s, the letters A M7CL are visible on the keyboard stand; at 12s, the text YAMAHA N7CL is seen on equipment; at 14s, the banner shows STERE.
